message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Design approved, no blocking feedback">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED

Product review of Step 9 design:

- Scope is exactly right: one clarify path (inbox -> waiting for), matching the established patterns from Steps 5 and 7.
- Using the inbox item's existing title for the WaitingForItem is correct — no reason to make the user re-type it. The only new field needed is waiting_on, which is the distinguishing information for this list.
- Progressive disclosure (radio button reveals waiting_on field, hides context selector) follows the same UX pattern users already know from clarify-as-next-action and clarify-as-project.
- Deferred items are explicitly out of scope. Good.

No blocking feedback. Ready to implement.
</teammate-message>

content.text: All 8 reviewers have now given explicit CONSENSUS: APPROVED. That's 8/9 including my own as Driver = 9/9 consensus.
